data.title: Mark Cuban Says He Supports Cutting Government Costs, But Hits Out At DOGE: 'I Would Have A Plan. Ready, Fire, Aim Is Not A Plan'
data.description: Mark Cuban defended his criticism of government cuts under DOGE, saying he supports efficiency, but only when done with a proper plan.

data.title: UnitedHealth Shares Rise 1.8% After Key Signal
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for UnitedHealth stock as it demonstrated a Power Inflow at $505.54, after which UNH rose up to 1.8%.

data.title: China, Hong Kong And Europe Markets Dip; Dollar Strengthens - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets closed lower on 3/20 due to economic data, Fed policy signals, and tariff concerns. Asian and European markets also saw declines.

data.title: Why Ethereum Is Lagging Bitcoin—Analysts Cite Inflationary Problems, Dencun Upgrade Blowback, And Solana's Meme Coins
data.description: Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, has charted a diametrically opposite trajectory when compared to its older sibling, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), over the past year.

data.title: Jeff Bezos And Nvidia-Backed Perplexity AI Eyes $18 Billion Valuation In New Funding Round — Doubling In Just 4 Months
data.description: Perplexity AI, backed by Jeff Bezos and Nvidia, is reportedly raising up to $1 billion at an $18 billion valuation.
